title: Settings Custom Swipe Sensor
scenario: Verify that the Custom Swipe Sensor settings in device settings match the expected configuration from the documentation.
steps: Start the app with Osprey connected.
Check for the Custom Swipe Sensor tab.
Verify the settings and values match the expected configuration from the Custom Swipe Sensor documentation.
expected: The Custom Swipe Sensor settings and values match the expected configuration from the Custom Swipe Sensor documentation.
